title: Marketing Coordinator
description: About AVB: AVB is a fast-growing, stable company that has a firm mission to do whatever it takes to keep our members profitably in business. Our vision is to deliver best in class growth solutions and service fueled by a passionate mission belief, innovation, and an unwavering commitment to doing what is right for our members, organization, and team members. AVB has an experienced development team, smart strategy team, bright and creative designers, along with the rest of our dream team of enthusiastic, entrepreneurial minded individuals who want to help drive the success of our members! We offer competitive salaries, full benefits, a flexible remote work environment, an employee reimbursement program to support enriching your life, EAP, employee discounts, a WFH stipend, an annual allowance for AVB apparel, 401k options, a robust sick time policy, and 5 Floating Holidays per year, along with a minimum of 10 days of vacation time that starts accruing from your first day. In addition, from time to time, our team members will be required to engage in travel to attend AVB’s Annual All-Employee Meeting, as well as other travel obligations which may be required of the position- such as meetings with members, attendance at conventions, and other events, where you will represent AVB! We are always looking for smart, resourceful, and dynamic people to join the team, so if you are looking for a company that will welcome you, collaborate with you, challenge you, and help develop your skills to the next level- then we are looking for you! We are geared up for growth, are you ready to grow with us? Home - AVB Marketing Position Summary/Objective: As a Marketing Coordinator, you play a critical support role within a growing team. You manage the day-to-day operations of your accounts by maintaining personable relationships with your assigned members/clients by communicating with them in a professional manner on a consistent basis. You coordinate requests of the member to the relevant team (whether it be Design, Ops, etc.) to ensure efficiency and congruence of the task at hand. The Marketing Coordinator is a vital position in understanding each individual member’s website intentions to make decisions that best fit the member’s business goals. Essential Functions and Responsibilities: Receive requests of website edits from members and execute accordingly. Conduct calls to members on a regular basis to solidify and moderate our professionalrelationships with them. Take the initiative to research and compare results of different types of PPC campaigns toevaluate and report to members on campaign success. Coordinate monthly meetings with members to deliver website analytics findings and discussplans of adjustments to make to keep expanding the member’s business and e-commerce goals. Proactively making knowledgeable recommendations to website-only members so that they seeand understand the importance and value in additional AVB Marketing services. Communicates directly with agencies, internal teams, and outside vendors as necessary onprogram implementation and become an expert on AVB Marketing's services and solutions Resolves problems and issues arising from client and/or projects and identifies key learnings andbest practices to prevent repeat of incident. Performs any other duties as assigned. Required Skills and Abilities: Ability to work independently and efficiently to complete monthly initiatives and goals Ability to analyze website performance to showcase successes and areas of opportunity toimprove e-commerce results Strong personable communication skills, especially over the phone, to create quick, trustworthyrelationships with members. Excellent verbal, written, organizational, and time management skills. Ability to work effectively within a fast-paced, highly collaborative, and interconnected environment. Education and Experience: Bachelors’ Degree from four-year college or university preferred Account Management: 1-2 years related experience preferred General understanding of, or desire to learn advertising, digital marketing, social media, creativeservices, e-commerce merchandising, and sales. 1-2 years customer service-related experience preferred Physical Requirements: Prolonged period of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

title: Director Of Growth Marketing
description: Sellstate Realty is seeking a strategic and execution-focused Director of Growth Marketing to lead the development of a scalable marketing engine that drives franchise growth, agent attraction, and long-term retention. This is a hands-on leadership role for a builder. We are looking for someone who can evaluate our current marketing efforts, identify gaps and opportunities, design a structured growth strategy, and implement the systems required to execute it effectively. You will begin as a one-person marketing department with full ownership of both strategy and execution. The right candidate will be comfortable building infrastructure, implementing automation, measuring performance, and refining systems before scaling a team. This position works directly with the CEO and leadership team and carries clear accountability for measurable growth outcomes tied to franchise sales. Compensation: $100,000 - $120,000 Responsibilities: Evaluate current marketing initiatives and define a measurable growth strategy Design and implement a scalable digital sales funnel from awareness to conversion Architect and execute campaigns within HubSpot or similar marketing automation platforms Build workflows, segmentation, lead nurturing sequences, and performance dashboards Track KPIs, ROI, and conversion performance to optimize growth Align branding and messaging with franchise expansion objectives Establish repeatable systems that allow marketing performance to scale Qualifications: 5+ years of digital marketing experience, including experience leading strategy and execution Demonstrated success in building marketing systems that produced measurable revenue growth Strong experience with marketing automation platforms such as HubSpot or similar CRM systems Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and drive performance improvements Proven ability to operate independently and build structure in a business-minded environment Strong project management and organizational skills Comfortable working in-office in Fort Myers, FL About Company Sellstate Realty is a national real estate franchise organization built on collaboration, agent success, ethical business practices, and continuous growth. We support independent broker-owners across the country by providing structure, technology, branding, and operational support that allows them to scale successfully. Our mission is to be the balance of real estate, empowering entrepreneurial brokers while maintaining strong systems and accountability. We are growth-focused, performance-driven, and committed to building long-term value for our franchise partners.

title: Photographer/Video
description: Job Summary We are seeking a dynamic and creative Photographer/Video Specialist to bring our visual storytelling to life! In this role, you will capture compelling images and videos that showcase our brand, products, and events. Your expertise in photography and videography will help craft engaging content for multiple platforms, including social media, websites, and marketing campaigns. This paid position offers an exciting opportunity to develop your skills in a fast-paced environment while making a meaningful impact through visual media. Duties Plan and execute photoshoots and video productions that align with brand objectives and creative concepts Operate professional camera equipment for filming, photography, and live event coverage Edit and enhance photos using industry-standard software such as Adobe Lightroom, Adobe Photoshop, Capture One, and Photo Manipulation tools Edit videos with Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, and other editing software to produce polished final cuts Manage color correction and color management processes to ensure visual consistency across all media Collaborate with the art direction team to develop creative concepts that resonate with target audiences Maintain organized digital archives of all media assets for easy access and future use Skills No experience needed. No equipment needed. We will train the right person with our knowledge to ensure the outcome is perfect! Videography skills is a plus! I am hiring for both! You don't have to work both ends. managing social media platforms and creating content optimized for digital engagement Ability to work independently or collaboratively in fast-paced environments while meeting deadlines Excellent communication skills as you will have to speak to numerous people on a weekend. Join us as a Photographer/Video Specialist to elevate our visual presence! Bring your passion for capturing moments and telling stories through stunning imagery and engaging videos. Your creativity will help shape our brand’s identity while gaining valuable experience in a vibrant team environment. Job Type: Part-time Pay: $150.00 - $223.86 per day Benefits: Flexible spending account Work Location: On the road

title: Sr. Product Marketing Manager, Telecom, AWS Industry Marketing
description: DESCRIPTION Are you an experienced product marketing leader in the Telecom industry? Are you passionate about how technology can be used to solve business problems? Are you eager to shape the way Telecom companies innovate and modernize their businesses? Industry verticals have unique needs and paths for cloud adoption, and the AWS Industry Marketing team helps drive product strategy, go-to-market motions, and marketing activities that help industry customers transform their businesses using the broadest and deepest portfolio of cloud services and solutions. We develop crisp, highly differentiated, and compelling positioning and messaging to address industry-specific customer needs. We tell AWS's most important and interesting stories to educate industry customers about what is possible when they build on AWS for their specialized use cases. As a senior product marketing manager for the Telecom industry, you will help define and drive messaging and thought leadership content for the vertical. You will deliver customer-centric storytelling across marketing channels to highlight how our vertical offerings drive meaningful, measurable customer impact in the Telecom space. You will own our marketing activities and presence for large-scale events, product launches, and customer and partner announcements, and develop programs that enable and educate AWS sales and GTM teams about our Telco-specific offerings. You will get to work on a rapidly growing business that has a real impact on people's everyday lives. The ideal candidate has a passion for technology services and how they can be used to create business outcomes in the Telecom vertical, the ability to transform complex technical concepts into easy-to-understand messaging and materials, and experience building and improving scalable mechanisms to deliver results. A proven track record of excelling in a data-driven product marketing organization is essential, Telecom industry subject-matter expertise desired but not required. This role can be based in Santa Clara (CA) or Seattle (WA). Key job responsibilities Craft & develop compelling stories, content and tools (e.g. presentations, whitepapers, infographics, webinars, customer success stories, product videos.) that land our Telecom value proposition Engage with customers and partners to drive advocacy Own content strategy and execution for key communication channels including website, blog, social, on-network promotion, and emails Plan and execute marketing initiatives at industry events to showcase Telecom messaging, content, keynotes, and breakout sessions Collaborate with AWS field support teams to maintain internal sales hubs with the latest industry resources, value propositions, and sales enablement content Partner with other marketing teams (e.g., web content, campaigns, demand generation, field teams, and events) to drive and execute on global marketing initiatives. Continuously measure and optimize product marketing initiatives About the team Diverse Experiences AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying. Why AWS? Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses. Work/Life Balance We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexible work hours and arrangements are part of our culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud. Inclusive Team Culture Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness. Mentorship & Career Growth We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional. BASIC QUALIFICATIONS 6+ years of professional non-internship marketing experience Experience in a marketing focused role including customer lifecycle marketing, segmentation reporting, customer funnel analysis, and top-line sales performance Experience driving direction and alignment with cross-functional teams Experience guiding creative input, development and execution from concept to completion Experience presenting metrics and progress to goal to senior leadership PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS 5+ years experience in Telecom industry Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Los Angeles County applicants: Job duties for this position include: work safely and cooperatively with other employees, supervisors, and staff; adhere to standards of excellence despite stressful conditions; communicate effectively and respectfully with employees, supervisors, and staff to ensure exceptional customer service; and follow all federal, state, and local laws and Company policies. Criminal history may have a direct, adverse, and negative relationship with some of the material job duties of this position. These include the duties and responsibilities listed above, as well as the abilities to adhere to company policies, exercise sound judgment, effectively manage stress and work safely and respectfully with others, exhibit trustworthiness and professionalism, and safeguard business operations and the Company’s reputation. Pursuant to the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $128,600/year in our lowest geographic market up to $212,600/year in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and/or other benefits. For more information, please visit https://www.aboutamazon.com/workplace/employee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career site.

title: Social Media Specialist
description: Description: For over 75 years, Terrazzo and Marble Supply Co. (T&M) has been one of the largest distributors of natural stone slab and tile, quartz surfacing, and a manufacturer of poured-in-place terrazzo and resinous flooring. As a 100% EMPLOYEE-OWNED company, we believe that the cornerstone of success is our employee-owners’ teamwork and dedication. Terrazzo & Marble Supply is looking for a Social Media Specialist. This full-time, permanent role is an addition to our growing Marketing team to support our company's continued growth. The primary responsibility of this role is to develop and execute social media strategies and content to enhance brand awareness and engagement and grow our social media presence. Job Responsibilities: Develop and execute social media strategies to enhance brand awareness and engagement and grow our social media presence across platforms such as LinkedIn and Meta. Create compelling social media content, including posts, graphics, and videos, tailored to our target audiences. Collaborate with various teams or departments to ensure consistent and effective messaging that supports major product/brand launches and marketing events with social content Manage our editorial calendar and own content planning Own proactive community engagement with fans such as responding to comments/messages, manage negative comments, tagging and following, engaging in social conversations, utilize user-generated content or running contests Monitor social media trends and analytics to optimize performance and report on key metrics. Identify and quickly act on real-time content opportunities or trends, and make ongoing recommendations for net new content formats, channels, creative optimizations or new opportunities to elevate T&M’s social media presence Identify and manage influencer relationships when applicable Performs other duties as assigned by manager. Requirements: What You'll Love About Us: Great Company Culture: Ownership culture means investing in each other's success. Our guiding cultural principles are Passionate, Collaborative, Accountable, Trusted, Innovative, and Resilient. Work that Stays at Work: True work-life balance. Rest and Relaxation: up to three weeks of Paid Time Off for a beginning year, growing to five weeks with longevity. Nine paid holidays and five paid early dismissals. Health Benefits: Medical with HSA (with company match) and FSA options, dental, vision, long-term disability, life insurance, and an employee assistance program. Prepare for the Future: 401(k) with company match, ESOP contributions, and employee financial education. Pay: $75,000 annually, depending on industry experience, potential to earn a yearly bonus, depending on company and individual performance. What you need to get the job done: Bachelor's degree in marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field is preferred. 3+ years of experience in social media marketing, content creation, or branding. Have the ability to manage different brand voices and ensure brand consistency in copy and creative through tone, voice and terminology. Strong knowledge of major social platforms (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok) and social media tools (e.g., Sprout Social, Canva). Demonstrated experience developing social media content and copy that drives engagement with key audiences and supports business goals. Strong writing, editing, and proofreading skills. Excellent organizational and project management abilities. Travel frequently for shoots, creator collabs, and brand events. Proactive, organized, and capable of managing multiple projects on a fast timeline. Strong communication and collaboration skills. Must be willing to work in office at our Wheeling HQ 3+ days a week, with an anticipated location change to Woodridge in 2027.

title: Marketing & Communications Coordinator
description: About The Role: The Crowd is partnering with a highly creative, internationally active architecture and design studio known for its thoughtful, boundary-pushing work across cultural, commercial, and residential environments. Their NYC-based team is seeking a versatile Marketing Coordinator to become the engine behind all things marketing, communications, and brand storytelling. Working directly with firm leadership, this role offers the chance to shape how the studio presents itself to the world while supporting day-to-day business development efforts. This is an ideal opportunity for a proactive, self-directed marketing professional who thrives in fluid, creative environments and enjoys wearing many hats. One week may focus on proposals and qualifications submissions, while another may involve social media content, internal communications, or broader brand initiatives. The studio values curiosity, flexibility, and creative problem-solving, and is looking for someone excited to grow into a well-rounded marketing role with real ownership and visibility. This position is hybrid, with three days in-office and two days remote in NYC. Key Responsibilities: Coordinate and produce marketing materials across proposals, RFQs/RFPs, presentations, and other business development efforts Manage and contribute to external communications, including social media, digital content, and brand storytelling initiatives Support internal communications and collaborate closely with principals and leadership on evolving marketing needs Maintain and update marketing assets, templates, and project information, ensuring consistency and clarity across platforms Act as the primary point person for marketing efforts, balancing multiple priorities in a fast-moving, creative studio environment Key Skills / Requirements: Approximately 3-6 years of experience in marketing, communications, or business development within a creative field Demonstrated experience supporting proposals, presentations, or qualifications submissions Strong working knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite and general comfort creating and editing visual and written content Highly organized, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently as the sole marketing professional Adaptable, collaborative, and confident working with creative, design-driven teams where priorities can shift and no two days look the same To apply for this position please click on the apply button to attach your resume (and portfolio for design positions). By applying for this role, you are confirming that you agree to our Privacy Policy (full details are shown at the bottom of our website), and that all details submitted by you are correct and to the best of your knowledge. The Crowd is an equal opportunities employer and agency.

title: SAP iXp Intern - Supply Chain Management Marketing & Communications
description: We help the world run better At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. About the SAP Internship Experience Program The SAP Internship Experience Program is SAP’s global, strategic, paid internship program that provides university students with opportunities to find purpose in their careers.Three reasons to intern at SAP Culture of collaboration: meet with mentors, make new friends across the globe and create a thriving personal network. Project-driven experience: gain cross-functional skills from our virtual and in-person learning sessions, diverse subject matter experts, and project deliverables. Gain visibility: with SAP Internship Experience Program in your title, you’ll have a global network of SAP leaders, entrepreneurs and career development opportunities at your fingertips. What you’ll do: We’re looking for a dynamic, detail-oriented intern to join our team and assist the Supply Chain Management Planning lead with logistics for our Customer Success Day (CSD) program. These events are designed to help SAP customers maximize value, drive adoption, and foster peer-to-peer collaboration. As an intern, you’ll gain invaluable experience in event planning, communications, and customer engagement while working on high-impact initiatives. Key Responsibilities: Communications Support Draft and edit both internal and external event-related communications, including newsletters, customer invitations, follow-up emails, visitor guides, etc. Collaborate with internal teams to align messaging and ensure consistent branding across all communications. Create digital assets for all post-event materials. Pre-Event Planning Assist with tasks leading up to an event such as creating microsites, name badges, customer introduction decks, customer networking dinner research, etc. Manage up-to date registration reports within our internal platform Support content development for presentations, social media posts, and other marketing materials. Internal Reporting Compile insights and feedback from past events to inform future programming. Draft post-event recaps and summary reports for internal distribution. Assist in tracking customer participation, feedback, and engagement metrics. Maintain an organized repository of materials for future reference and scalability. What you bring: We’re looking for someone who takes initiative, perseveres, and stay curious. You like to work on meaningful innovative projects and are energized by lifelong learning. You like to work on meaningful innovative projects and are energized by lifelong learning. Marketing, Commerce, Communications, Event Management, Business Administration related degree (Bachelor’s, Master’s, MBA). You should be a team player, with a self-starter attitude and the ability to work with minimal direction. Strong communication/writing and organization skills are important. Above all, you should be passionate about technology, customer experience, event & communications management, and value realization. Top skills or competencies: Project Management Event Management Strong Relationship/Interpersonal skills Detail Oriented Curious Demonstrated Self Starter and Fast Learner Strong written communication skills (email, PPT, marketing content) Intermediate Excel skills Basic graphic design skills (e.g. Canva) Strong organizational skills Business Acumen Consultative Skills Demonstrated previous experience in the above areas Prefer someone who worked at SAP before Demonstrate strong collaboration skills Proficient in content creation Website management Digital Media experience an asset Meet your team: Our team is a dynamic and collaborative group that thrives on creating meaningful customer experiences. We work globally, connecting with colleagues and customers across various regions to deliver seamless and impactful events. While this role is hybrid, you’ll have the opportunity to engage with team members in different time zones and cultures, providing a truly international perspective. We are passionate about fostering customer success and building strong relationships.Bring out your best SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best. We win with inclusion SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world. title: Product Manager
description: Description: This position is responsible for leading the collaboration with vendor partners in the development and launch new product lines into the global Pet Specialty retail channel, as well as managing successful in-market product lines which contribute to KONG’s brand impact, revenue, and margin. Essential Duties/Responsibilities Lead the collaborative relationship with vendor partners to identify, design, and develop new product lines and product line extensions. Negotiate with vendor partner for product cost of goods. Analyze and establish break even points for ROI analysis. Utilize cost/margin-based analysis to form pricing recommendations. Work across all departments to successfully bring new products to market. Facilitate new product line purchase order logistics of quantity and timing. Determine and enter forecast demands for all new product lines. Perform competitive assessments and research trends to identify future opportunities. Review monthly sales and penetration numbers. Analyze new products, sales trends and goals. Provide product expertise for internal and external requirements. Develop product expansion strategies for successful product lines. Develop plans for discontinued products that retain shelf space and minimize customer impact. Collaborate and communicate with brand team in project management tool (Wrike). Manage product data within internal systems. Other duties as assigned. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree and 3-4 years related experience or an equivalent combination of education and experience. Excellent proficiency in MS Office suite: Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook. Experience with CAD or generative AI tools is a plus. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Proven track record of successfully managing long and short-term projects. Experience with mobilizing cross functional support. Ability to research, assess and solve problems. Must be detail oriented. Ability to use independent judgment, analyze information and formulate recommendations. Strong project management and multi-tasking skills. Ability to provide outstanding customer service. Organized and proactive approach to managing and executing projects. Effectively communicate ideas and activities across departments. Creative, enthusiastic, and efficient. Work well with tight deadlines, be flexible as priorities change. Ability to self-motivate and prioritize simultaneous tasks. Experience working with China is a plus. Must be able to lift 25-50 pounds and occasionally up to 100 pounds with assistance. This job description is not intended to be an exhaustive list of all duties, responsibilities or qualifications associated with the job. Compensation From $110,000 annually Work Location KONG Headquarters - Golden, Colorado Benefits Health, Dental and Vision Insurance with low-cost premiums Access to voluntary benefits Employer paid short-term/long term disability and life insurance 401k with employer matching 12 Paid Holidays Personal Leave Accrual Pet Insurance, Tuition reimbursement, dog toys, and more!

title: Social Media Video Editor
description: Job Overview We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Social Media Video Editor to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for editing engaging content, delivering final social media videos and enhancing our brand presence across digital channels. This role requires a strong understanding of social media strategies, content creation, and analytics to drive audience engagement and support our overall marketing goals. Duties Edit compelling content tailored for various social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Monitor social listening channels to gather insights on audience preferences and industry trends. Utilize Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro) for graphic design, photo editing, and video production to enhance visual storytelling. Implement SEO best practices and keyword research to optimize content visibility and reach. Analyze web and social media analytics using Google Analytics and web analytics tools to measure campaign performance. Suggest Facebook Advertising campaigns to increase brand awareness and audience growth. Proofread all content for accuracy, clarity, and brand consistency before publishing. Experience Proven experience in social media content creation. Strong skills in graphic design, video editing, and photography are highly desirable. Knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) and Adobe Premiere Pro or other video editing software. Understanding of SEO principles, Google Analytics, and web analytics tools for data-driven decision making. Ability to create engaging content that aligns with brand voice and marketing objectives. Join us as a Social Media Editor to craft innovative digital narratives that elevate our brand’s online presence while working in a collaborative environment focused on creativity and strategic growth. Job Type: Temporary Pay: $18.11 - $20.83 per hour Expected hours: 5 per week Application Question(s): Who is your favorite social media follow? Experience: Social media strategy: 1 year (Preferred) Shift availability: Day Shift (Preferred) Ability to Commute: Remote (Preferred) Work Location: Remote

title: Marketing Content Manager
description: SeattleFWC2026 is seeking a seasoned, Manager-level marketing leader to oversee the execution of marketing initiatives tied to the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Seattle. This role is designed to provide immediate operational relief and executional leadership across production, coordination-heavy initiatives, content management, and posting to digital platforms. This position reports to the Director of Marketing & Brand and works as a partner within the Communications and Marketing team. This Manager will focus on operationalizing, facilitating, and executing existing strategies, ensuring initiatives are delivered on time, on brand, and with quality. Position Duration: Immediately through July 31 Compensation: $6,700 to $8,500/month Manager-level salary plus benefits Status: Exempt ESSENTIAL FUNCTIONS A.  Production Coordination & Content Management Lead coordination and execution of marketing-related content capture from planning through delivery Own production timelines, calendars, and run-of-show planning for shoots, events, and activations Coordinate logistics across internal teams, serving as the point of contact for vendors, photographers, videographers, agencies, and partners Manage approvals, dependencies, and deadlines to ensure initiatives are delivered on time and at a high standard Coordinate final asset delivery from external partners and ensure content is published across appropriate channels, including website, social media, and partner platforms (if applicable) Ensure all content aligns with established messaging, tone, and visual identity Anticipate risks and proactively resolve operational challenges C. Social Media Ownership & Execution Own and manage all social media operations, including planning, scheduling, and publishing content Contribute towards building the social media content calendar Collaborate with marketing leadership to support campaign execution D. Brand Stewardship & Cross-Functional Collaboration Execute within existing brand strategy, systems, and guidelines while maintaining a high bar for quality and consistency Act as a partner to marketing leadership, enabling focus on brand strategy, structural planning, and other initiatives Communicate clearly and confidently with internal teams, leadership, and external partners Protect and enhance the SeattleFWC26 brand through consistent messaging and visual identity E. Administrative & Team Participation Participate as an active member of the Communications and Marketing team Manage professional services agreements related to production and content where applicable Support a culture of collaboration, accountability, and inclusion consistent with organizational values Provide clear status updates and reporting on initiative progress QUALIFICATIONS SeattleFWC2026 is seeking a highly capable, execution-oriented marketing leader with Manager-level judgment and experience. Key qualifications include: 4+ years of experience in marketing, brand, experiential, or content-driven roles Proven experience leading production-heavy initiatives in fast-paced, high-visibility environments Strong organizational and project management skills, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously Experience working with photographers, videographers, agencies, and external partners Fluency in digital content workflows, including social media platforms, Microsoft Office, etc Confident communicator able to operate peer-to-peer with senior leadership Experience working in Adobe Creative Suite/ handling design files WORK ENVIRONMENT In-office work required five days per week in the spring. Attendance at events and meetings in and around the city/region. Must be available to work a flexible schedule, including evenings and weekends as needed. Must be able to reliably travel locally. Must be eligible to work in the United States without sponsorship Equal Employment Opportunity: SeattleFWC26 strongly supports equal employment opportunity for all applicants regardless of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, pregnancy, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, marital status, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by state or federal law. In compliance with federal law, all persons hired will be required to verify identity and eligibility to work in the United States and to complete upon hire a required employment eligibility verification form. Application Process: Interested applicants should send a resume and cover letter to Media@sea2026.org , subject line: “Marketing Manager Application, [FIRST LAST]”

title: Marketing Intern

title: Sales & Marketing Coordinator (Part-Time)
description: Sales & Marketing Coordinator (Part-Time) | Hotel Leo Let’s start off with the most important part - what’s in it for you: The Perks Eligibility of perks is dependent upon job status Hourly Pay Range: $25 to $30 DOE Commuter/Parking Allowance Get Paid Daily (Make any day payday) Paid Time off & Holiday Pay (Because Balance Matters) Benefits - Medical, Dental, Vision, Disability, 401K HSA/FSA Plans -with employer contribution Values Based Culture (#OMGLIFE) Culture Add (Creating Space for Fresh Perspectives) Referral Bonus (Get Paid to Recruit) Discounted Lodging, Dining, Spa, Golf, and Retail (Yes, Discounted Travel!) Employee Assistance Program “Columbia Cares” Volunteer Opportunities Committee Participation Opportunities (Fun, Philanthropic, Diversity/Equity/Inclusion) Task Force Work Opportunities (Grow your career in idyllic locations across the globe) Online Learning Platform to Help You Grow! Third Party Perks (Including discounts on Pet Insurance, Rental Cars, Movie and Concert Tickets, Theme Park and Attractions & so much more) Our Commitment to you: “People never forget how you made them feel.” Maya Angelou’s famous statement serves as a rallying cry throughout Columbia Hospitality and fuels our collective drive - and success. Our people are our purpose, and our brand is our people. We seek extraordinary individuals who drive our brand promise of Creating Exceptional Experiences. We are a people-first organization, ignited from the inside to succeed on the outside. We are a tight-knit, inclusive, values-driven team and we trust one another to have each other’s backs. We show up every day with open hearts, an inclusive mindset, and a genuine respect for those around us. We have fun, grow together, and strive to leave a positive lasting impression on everyone we meet. What you'll do: The Brass Tacks The ideal candidate will live in the Bellingham area and have a deep understanding of Bellingham and the surrounding community. Work with General Manager to promote Hotel / Food & Beverage events both out in the community and via online promotion. Assist Marketing Manager with content gathering on property for website updates. Act as social media champion on site, capturing content and sharing with Marketing Manager and GM. Perform administrative functions, organize calendars and department meetings, read/route incoming mail, draft routine correspondence; design and maintain organization systems. Assist managers in executing events as needed. Answer sales-related telephone calls, take clear/concise messages, provide information, and/or direct calls to appropriate team member. Assist with editing and formatting of collateral: menus, compendiums, flyers, etc. as needed. Be responsible for calendar and event listings ensuring that Hotel Leo’s programming is included in desired local outlets. Handle vendor coordination by responding to inquiries, gathering media kits, and conducting research as needed. Develop and maintain favorable working relationships and open communication with all departments. Additional duties / special projects as assigned. The Nitty Gritty A university degree in marketing or business-related discipline with at least one year of relevant experience; or an equivalent combination of education, training and experience. General knowledge of marketing tools and techniques, particularly digital marketing. Strong written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to write, proofread and edit reports, business correspondence, and promotional content. Effectively present information and respond to questions from team members, managers, clients, guests and the general public. Detail oriented with strong multi-tasking and organizational skills. Solid personal management skills, including time management, planning and organizing, and delivery of results. Ability to compute discounts, interest, commissions, proportions, and percentages. Strong computer literacy in Microsoft Office, especially Word, Excel and Outlook. Effective problem solver able to make decisions in routine situations. Competency in Adobe Creative Suite preferred, specifically InDesign, Illustrator and Photoshop preferred. Don’t meet every single requirement? At Columbia Hospitality we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles. Where you’ll work: This thoughtfully restored, historic hotel may have been through many iterations over its lifespan, and yet has always been synonymous with the highest standards of hospitality. Welcome to Hotel Leo, located in the heart of wonderful downtown Bellingham. Hotel Leo, which is on both the National and Local Historic Registry, combines modern comfort with classic style - offering a unique combination of hotel lodging and apartment residences - with a lively mix of common spaces. The Fine Print Columbia Hospitality, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer committed to an inclusive environment without regard to age, race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, disability, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or any other protected status in accordance with applicable law. We strive for excellence in every position within the company and select the most qualified people who embrace our service philosophy and these values. Accountability | Creativity | Enthusiasm | Honesty | Inclusion | Respect Columbia Hospitality is a national management and consulting company with more than 25 years of experience in creating hospitality solutions and delivering exceptional experiences. Our portfolio includes award-winning hotels and resorts, premier residential communities, restaurants and bars, private and public golf clubs, conference centers, and distinctive venues. Columbia Hospitality has been consistently recognized as one of the Top Companies to Work for in Washington by Seattle Business Magazine and Puget Sound Business Journal for their commitment to creating a fun, dynamic and nurturing work environment for team members.

title: Executive Editor
description: Company Description Richner Communications, Inc. (RCI), founded in 1964 by the Richner family, is a prominent local media company in New York. With over 30 community newspapers and related products, RCI caters primarily to the affluent Long Island market. Their flagship newspaper group, Herald Community Newspapers, has earned local and national recognition for its excellence in journalism and innovative marketing efforts. RCI maintains a solid reputation for delivering high-quality content to its readership. Role Description This is a full-time, on-site role for an Executive Editor based in Garden City, NY. The Executive Editor will oversee the newsroom team to ensure the production of accurate, engaging, and high-quality editorial content across multiple community newspapers. Responsibilities include assigning stories, editing articles, leading editorial meetings, managing deadlines, mentoring staff, and maintaining adherence to journalistic ethics and standards. The Executive Editor will also collaborate with other departments to align editorial goals with business objectives and ensure a seamless publishing process. Qualifications Strong expertise in editing, proofreading, and overseeing journalistic content Leadership and team management skills to guide and mentor editorial staff Proficiency in content strategy, developing editorial plans, and maintaining editorial integrity Exceptional written and verbal communication abilities Deep understanding of local journalism, as well as regional and national media trends Ability to work under tight deadlines and lead a fast-paced newsroom environment Bachelor's degree in Journalism, Communications, or related field Experience in community journalism and a commitment to serving local audiences is preferred

title: New Home Marketing Associate
description: Job Overview We are seeking a New Home Marketing Associate Premiere Home Builder in Clarksville, TN! Are you ready to elevate your career in the exciting world of home building? We’re seeking a passionate and driven Marketing Associate to join our team at Nicholas Construction. If you have a strong moral compass, a desire to succeed, and a willingness to learn, we want to hear from you! About Us: At Nicholas Construction, we specialize in crafting exquisite homes in Clarksville, TN. Our commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and customer satisfaction sets us apart in the industry. As we continue to grow, we need dedicated individuals to help us connect with potential clients and showcase the beauty of our homes. What We’re Looking For: High Moral Character: Integrity is at the core of our values, and we seek individuals who share this commitment. Driven to Succeed: We want team members who are ambitious and motivated to reach their goals. Coachable and Teachable: You should be open to learning and embracing new challenges as we provide comprehensive training. What You’ll Do: Assist in developing and executing marketing strategies to promote our homes. Engage with potential clients through various channels, helping them understand our offerings and guiding them through the sales process. Collaborate with our team to create compelling marketing materials that highlight the unique features of our homes. Contribute to the overall growth of the company by helping to drive sales and build strong client relationships. Compensation: We offer the best pay and opportunities for you to advance in your career, to make incredible earnings. Why Join Us? This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a thriving company in the new home market. With our proven training system, you’ll gain the skills and knowledge needed to succeed, all while working in a supportive environment that encourages personal and professional growth. If you’re ready to embark on a rewarding career journey with Nicholas Construction LLC, apply today! Let’s build something extraordinary together. Job Type: Full-time Pay: $35,000.00 - $75,000.00 per year Schedule: No nights Experience: None Required Ability to Commute: Clarksville, TN Work Location: In person ng strategies to generate leads and support sales growth. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and are passionate about real estate marketing, this role is perfect for you! Responsibilities Develop and execute comprehensive marketing campaigns for new home communities utilizing multichannel marketing strategies, including digital advertising, print media, social media, and email marketing. Manage and optimize online content across platforms such as WordPress websites, social media channels, and email campaigns to attract potential buyers. Utilize SEO best practices to improve online visibility and organic search rankings for property listings and community pages. Create compelling content including copywriting for advertisements, brochures, blogs, and social media posts that highlight the unique features of each development. Coordinate with advertising sales teams to promote properties through targeted advertising campaigns on platforms like Facebook Advertising and Google AdWords. Analyze campaign performance using tools like Google Analytics and marketing automation platforms to refine strategies and maximize ROI. Collaborate with product management teams to ensure marketing efforts align with sales goals and community branding standards. Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor activities, and potential opportunities within the real estate sector. Manage budgets for advertising campaigns, ensuring cost-effective allocation of resources across print, digital, and social media channels. Qualifications Proven experience in digital marketing, content marketing, or real estate marketing with a strong understanding of multichannel marketing tactics. Proficiency in SEO techniques, Google Analytics, Google AdWords, Facebook Advertising, and marketing automation tools. Skilled in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) for creating visual content; familiarity with HTML and WordPress is a plus. Strong copywriting abilities with an eye for engaging storytelling that resonates with prospective homebuyers. Knowledge of e-commerce platforms and performance marketing strategies to drive lead generation efforts effectively. Experience in research methodologies to gather market insights and competitive intelligence. Excellent communication skills paired with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously within budget constraints. A proactive team player who is eager to learn new skills in B2B (business-to-business) marketing environments related to real estate development. Join us as a New Home Marketing Associate and be part of a vibrant team dedicated to transforming communities through innovative marketing solutions! Pay: $35,000.00 - $75,000.00 per year Work Location: In person

title: Digital Marketer
description: We are seeking a highly motivated and creative Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team in the fastest growing prosthetic patient care company with a national presence. As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will play a pivotal role in our marketing department, focusing on content creation, video production, social media management, and brand awareness initiatives within our local and national communities. Responsibilities: Develop and execute innovative digital marketing strategies to enhance brand visibility and engagement with our target audience. Create compelling and visually appealing content, including videos, blog posts, infographics, and other multimedia materials to educate and inform our audience about our products and services. Manage and maintain our social media presence across various platforms, including but not limited to Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Monitor and analyze social media metrics, website traffic, and online engagement to identify trends, measure effectiveness, and optimize campaigns for improved results. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align marketing strategies and ensure consistent brand messaging across all channels. Identify opportunities for partnerships, sponsorships, and collaborations to expand brand reach and increase brand awareness. Stay updated with industry trends, best practices, and emerging technologies in digital marketing to provide recommendations for continuous improvement. Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify gaps and opportunities for growth. Assist in the development and execution of email marketing campaigns, SEO strategies, and digital advertising campaigns. Track, analyze, and report on the performance of digital marketing campaigns using relevant analytics tools. Requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field. Proven experience in digital marketing, preferably within the healthcare or medical industry. Strong expertise in content creation, video production, and multimedia storytelling. Proficient in social media management, including knowledge of best practices and familiarity with various platforms. Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a keen eye for detail. Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and derive actionable insights. Familiarity with SEO, email marketing, and digital advertising techniques. Knowledge of graphic design tools and video editing software is a plus. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. Passionate about the healthcare industry and improving the lives of prosthetic patients. Portfolio of related work will be a part of the interview process Join our team and be part of a rapidly growing company that is dedicated to providing exceptional patient care and making a positive impact in the prosthetic healthcare community. Apply now to contribute your digital marketing expertise and help us expand our brand awareness to new heights. Job Type: Full-time Pay: $14.00 - $16.00 per hour Benefits: 401(k) 401(k) matching Dental insurance Employee assistance program Health insurance Health savings account Life insurance Paid time off Retirement plan Vision insurance Experience: Marketing: 1 year (Preferred) Digital marketing: 1 year (Preferred) Medical sales: 1 year (Preferred) Work Location: In person

title: Proposal Coordinator
description: Founded in 1984, BEAR Construction Company is a family-owned General Contracting and Construction Management firm located in Chicagoland, completing work throughout Illinois and Wisconsin. In addition to our 100+ full-time professionals, we also employ a large team of union carpenters, laborers and decorators. Position Overview The Proposal Coordinator, reporting to the Director of Marketing, will play a key role in supporting the successful pursuit of projects by coordinating proposals, assisting with client and company events, and contributing to marketing and communications initiatives. We are seeking a proactive self-starter with strong attention to detail, excellent planning and follow-through, and a sense of accountability. The ideal candidate can manage their time effectively, adapt to changing priorities, and bring drive, flexibility, and a good sense of humor to a fast-paced, collaborative environment. Duties & Responsibilities: Work with project management and senior leadership to coordinate and produce marketing collateral for all stages of project opportunities, including qualifications, RFQs/RFPs, interviews, and follow-up materials. Coordinate and produce marketing collateral such as resumes, project sheets, project lists, flyers, brochures, and other boilerplate content, ensuring information is current and formatted in line with Corporate Brand Standards. Print, bind, and package materials as needed. Perform resizing, cropping, and basic editing of photos for use in collateral; modify and/or create graphics and charts as required. Assist with maintaining the integrity of marketing databases, conduct audits as needed, and track project pursuits and other marketing-related activities. Collaborate with internal stakeholders (e.g., Business Development, Human Resources, IT, Training, Safety) to create high-quality custom packages. Provide guidance to employees and stakeholders on the proper use of marketing tools and systems. Establish and maintain effective, collaborative working relationships with marketing staff, team leaders, and other personnel. Assist with special projects and events, including employee and client communications. Qualifications: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a proven ability to proofread and edit marketing materials. Proficient in Adobe InDesign and Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint); experience with Photoshop and Illustrator is a plus. Familiarity with CRM systems is a plus. Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities effectively. Conscientious, flexible, and a strong team player with a solid work ethic. Skilled at balancing diplomacy and persistence when interacting with internal and external stakeholders. Strong time management and prioritization abilities. Willingness to go the extra mile to meet deadlines and support team needs. BEAR Construction provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

title: Sr Field Marketing Manager, Amazon Business
description: DESCRIPTION Come be a part of a rapidly expanding $45 billion dollar global business. At Amazon Business, a fast-growing startup passionate about building solutions, we set out every day to innovate and disrupt the status quo. We stand at the intersection of tech & retail in the B2B space developing innovative purchasing and procurement solutions to help businesses and organizations thrive. At Amazon Business, we strive to be the most recognized and preferred strategic partner for smart business buying. Bring your insight, imagination and a healthy disregard for the impossible. Join us in building and celebrating the value of Amazon Business to buyers and sellers of all sizes and industries. Unlock your career potential. As the Sr. Field Marketing Manager, you will be responsible for increasing consideration, acquisition, and adoption of Amazon Business within Enterprise accounts. You will partner closely with Sales and cross-functional Marketing teams to concept and deliver integrated marketing programs including demand generation campaigns, executive events, and other field marketing campaigns such as tradeshows, content and sales enablement. To be successful in this role, this individual will work seamlessly with senior stakeholders in Sales and Marketing at Amazon Business and pan-Amazon teams such as AWS to align and implement strategies. We are looking for an individual with broad experience in field marketing and integrated marketing campaign leadership. Field marketing includes annual strategic planning, event management, webinar creation, and executive engagement programs. Candidate should be capable of being strategic and tactical. This role requires skills in strategic thinking, relationship building, and problem solving, as well as a willingness to be hands-on with execution. The individual will thrive in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment, have impeccable attention to detail, and will have a track record of on-time delivery of projects. If you’re looking to join a dynamic, growing team in a high-impact role, this is a great fit for you. Key job responsibilities Develop the integrative marketing strategy to reach and engage C-suite and decision makers, across enterprise accounts, through bespoke, 1-to-1, and 1-to-few Account Based Marketing campaigns and initiatives. Lead Executive Engagement initiatives such as Customer Advisory Boards, Executive Briefings, Executive Dinners. Own planning and execution of bespoke marketing channels like Webinars, Direct Mail, Sponsorships, third party events across client, trade and association publications, etc. Manage relationships with internal Marketing, Sales, Sales Enablement, and Product stakeholders, as well as external media agencies and partners. Drive robust and detailed measurement and reporting processes. A day in the life The Sr Field Marketing Manager is the conduit between Sales and broader Marketing teams. They will dive deep with Sales to understand key business priorities, and work hand-in-hand with extended marketing teams such as digital, content, and channel marketing teams to create and then execute an integrated marketing plan that supports those priorities. They will act as the single point of contact for all of Marketing, driving visibility of upcoming initiatives to Sales, and reporting back campaign impact. About the team You will join the field marketing team. Field marketing coordinates all marketing activities across partner marketing, sales, and product teams. BASIC QUALIFICATIONS 6+ years of professional non-internship marketing experience Experience using data and metrics to drive improvements Experience with Excel or Tableau (data manipulation, macros, charts and pivot tables) Experience building, executing and scaling cross-functional marketing programs Experience communicating results to senior leadership Bachelor's degree PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS Experience creating and executing integrated marketing lead generation campaigns using tactics that include live or virtual events, webinars, email, lead nurture programs, and CRM/sales insights Experience with Salesforce and Tableau Amazon is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status. Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner. Our compensation reflects the cost of labor across several US geographic markets. The base pay for this position ranges from $112,800/year in our lowest geographic market up to $186,500/year in our highest geographic market. Pay is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Amazon is a total compensation company. Dependent on the position offered, equity, sign-on payments, and other forms of compensation may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to a full range of medical, financial, and/or other benefits. For more information, please visit https://www.aboutamazon.com/workplace/employee-benefits. This position will remain posted until filled. Applicants should apply via our internal or external career site.

title: Director, Brand Strategy

Our mission is to inspire a healthier, happier, well-er world through award-winning work. If you google us (which you may have done already), you’ll see that spreading wellness is literally our mission. We don’t just talk about making your well-being the most important thing, we mean it. Having a flexible hybrid-work policy, plentiful time off, and colleagues who want you to do well are all part of the gig. Oh, and of course the opportunity to work on some of the good-vibiest campaigns on the planet with very caring, very resourceful people. So, if you’re a rockstar writer, aspiring strategist, jill—or jack—of all trades, or just an all-around nice person, let’s chat. Overview Are you an innovative strategist who’s keen to apply your talent to the health and wellness space? Would you like to work in one of the fast growing and most innovative therapeutic categories? Would you like to be part of the largest healthcare communications network in the world? Do you believe in challenging convention and pushing for new ways to look at things? Do you enjoy working in a collaborative, fast-paced environment? Do you have a passion for inspiring and nurturing great ideas? If so, then this could be the perfect opportunity for you. Responsibilities Developing strong client relationships as a key strategic and business partner Guiding the strategic direction in relation to our clients’ brand development and marketing approach Gain a deep, holistic and evolving understanding of our client’s business objectives, challenges, threats and opportunities – including forward looking awareness of emerging competitive threats Developing a deep understanding of our clients’ customers’ wants, needs, and behaviors across the full customer journey (awareness > trial > continuation) Developing an understanding and ability to advocate for the full suite of strategic skillsets and solutions offered by SSW Collaborating with the creative, account, strategy, medical and analytics teams on business, brand and communications/content strategies Developing POVs for our clients around business-critical issues and trends Mining provocative insights that form the basis for effective communication, marketing, business and creative strategies Developing inspiring creative and project briefs Ability to lead the translation of insights into strategies and tactics Leading internal brainstorms and client workshops Participating in new business pitches Partnering with clients on market research activities Qualifications HCP marketing experience Able to become deeply immersed in our clients’ business on both a commercial and clinical/scientific level Able to develop strong client relationships and trust based on deep immersion in their business Bring a rounded competency set spanning brand strategy/creative development/digital engagement, or, in other words Creative thinker Adept at storytelling Able to simplify and clarify complex concepts Excellent analytical skills Presence and personality, or, in other words Superb and persuasive communications skills, both written and verbal Clients and the internal team want to work with you Collaborative approach Leadership skills Additional Information Our Publicis Groupe motto “Viva La Différence” means we’re better together, and we believe that our differences make us stronger. It means we honor and celebrate all identities, across all facets of intersectionality, and it underpins all that we do as an organization. We are focused on fostering belonging and creating equitable & inclusive experiences for all talent. Publicis Groupe provides robust and inclusive benefit programs and policies to support the evolving and diverse needs of our talent and enable every person to grow and thrive. Our benefits package includes medical coverage, dental, vision, disability, 401K, as well as parental and family care leave, family forming assistance, tuition reimbursement, and flexible time off. If you require accommodation or assistance with the application or onboarding process specifically, please contact USMSTACompliance@publicis.com. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines. Compensation Range: $106,780 - $170,937 annually. This is the pay range the Company believes it will pay for this position at the time of this posting. Consistent with applicable law, compensation will be determined based on the skills, qualifications, and experience of the applicant along with the requirements of the position, and the Company reserves the right to modify this pay range at any time. Temporary roles may be eligible to participate in our freelancer/temporary employee medical plan through a third-party benefits administration system once certain criteria have been met. Temporary roles may also qualify for participation in our 401(k) plan after eligibility criteria have been met. For regular roles, the Company will offer medical coverage, dental, vision, disability, 401k, and paid time off. The Company anticipates the application deadline for this job posting will be 03/05/2026.

title: Strategy Director
description: The Strategy Director at 829 Studios plays a pivotal role in steering the development and execution of comprehensive marketing strategies and campaigns. This role demands a profound understanding of data-driven insights, customer segmentation, and a holistic view of multi-channel marketing including search, social, email, SEO, programmatic, direct mail, PR, and influencer marketing. As a senior member of the Client Services department, the Strategy Director is responsible for generating innovative ideas that challenge conventional marketing and operational tactics, thereby encouraging creative and operational teams to pursue disruptive and groundbreaking approaches. What You'll Do: Provide strategic leadership to the account team, orchestrating integrated solutions across design, digital marketing, and analytics. Ensure high-quality deliverables are presented to clients with the support of Account Managers. Develop comprehensive creative briefs that encapsulate key insights and messaging themes, serving as a source of inspiration for the team. Lead and oversee research and analytics initiatives (e.g., stakeholder interviews, process documentation) to deeply understand client strategies, market dynamics, and organizational strengths. Define and track critical performance indicators, offering actionable insights to drive success. Engage closely with clients, gaining an in-depth understanding of their products, business objectives, and challenges to identify new project opportunities that align with 829’s competencies. Translate complex data and findings into persuasive narratives tailored for C-level executives and key decision-makers. Design and facilitate dynamic digital client workshops, encouraging innovative solutions to complex business problems. Serve as the strategic practice leader, enhancing the agency’s strategic capabilities and defining executional requirements. Innovate and productize 829’s strategic services, continuously seeking opportunities to add value to client relationships. Actively contribute to business development, evaluating/auditing new business prospects and validating project scopes. Collaborate closely with the sales and marketing teams to assist with sales engineering efforts. Conduct strategic onboardings for key clients ensuring a seamless transition from sales to marketing. Remain abreast of emerging digital trends to continually refine strategies and infuse fresh, innovative ideas into client projects and internal team dynamics. What You'll Bring: 10+ years extensive experience in digital marketing, with a proven track record in a senior strategic role. Demonstrated ability in leading and mentoring teams to deliver high-impact marketing solutions. Strong analytical skills with an aptitude for translating complex data into actionable strategies. Exceptional communication skills, capable of engaging effectively with C-level executives. Proficient in navigating multi-disciplinary marketing channels and tools. Advanced understanding of customer segmentation, market analysis, and brand positioning. Creative and innovative thinker, with a flair for identifying emerging trends and integrating them into strategies. Experience in conducting and leading high-level workshops and presentations. Strong business acumen, with an ability to identify and seize new business opportunities. Adept at building and maintaining strong client relationships. Benefits and Perks We Provide Remote Workplace. You have the option to work at our office in Boston or remotely in the United States. Paid Time Off. Receive generous paid vacation benefits that increase each year you’re with us, 12 Company Holidays, and Summer Fridays from Memorial Day through Labor Day. 401K + Match. 401K plan with 4% Safe Harbor employer match after one year of employment and financial literacy services provided through our retirement provider. Life Insurance Benefit. No-cost coverage to ensure peace of mind for your family. Short Term Disability Benefit. We've got you covered if you need to be OOO with an illness or injury that keeps you out of work. Healthcare. Choose from several competitive healthcare plans for you and your family with 80% employer coverage for all medical and dental premiums, 100% employer coverage for vision, and the option to participate in the FSA program. Commuter Benefits. Allocate pre-tax funds towards your commute to save up to 40% per year in transportation expenses. Continuing Education. Access to monthly team-led webinars, exclusive 829-cohort based learning, digital course platforms, and funding opportunities to attend national conferences and events. What We Believe At 829 Studios, we boldly embrace diversity, inclusivity, and equal opportunity. Our goal: a team rich in backgrounds, perspectives, and talents. Why? Because inclusivity powers our brilliance and client success. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer that is committed to equal employment opportunities regardless of race, religion, creed, color, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, national origin, disability, mental illness, age, ancestry, genetic information, military service, or any other status protected under applicable federal, state, or local laws. Who We Are 829 Studios is a Boston-based integrated digital marketing agency with a mission to propel organizations to unlock their full potential and accomplish their most ambitious goals. We harness the power of logic with magic – a balance of data-driven strategy and brand-focused creative. We partner with diverse organizations across various industries and our client list encompasses venture-backed start-ups, publicly traded companies, non-profits, and more. title: Social Media Assistant
description: POSITION SUMMARY: As a key member of our brand and engagement team, the Social Media Assistant is the front line of our brand across social platforms. This role owns day-to-day community interaction, direct messages and influencer inquiries ensuring every response is timely, thoughtful, and on brand. You will help build trust, foster brand advocacy, and nurture relationships with creators, influencers, and customers through meaningful one-to-one engagement. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Own daily monitoring and response of direct messages, comments, and mentions across major social platforms including Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest, and emerging channels. Serve as the first point of contact for influencer, creator, partnership, and collaboration inquiries received via DMs or social channels. Respond to community questions, feedback, and issues in a timely, empathetic, and brand-aligned manner. Escalate customer experience, PR, or sensitive issues to the appropriate internal teams as needed. Maintain a consistent, distinctive brand voice while tailoring responses to each platform’s tone and audience expectations. Build and nurture relationships with creators, influencers, and brand advocates through ongoing social communication. Support influencer program execution by assisting with outreach, coordination, and performance tracking. Track recurring questions, sentiment, and community themes to identify opportunities for improved messaging, FAQs, or content. Provide regular insights and feedback from community interactions to marketing, creative, PR, and customer experience teams. Help evolve community management workflows, response guidelines, and inbox best practices to scale engagement efficiently. REQUIREMENTS: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field (or equivalent experience). 1-3 years of experience managing social media communities, with a strong focus on DM engagement and real-time response. Customer Service Experience is a plus Must be available on weekends Proven experience handling influencer, creator, or partnership inquiries via social platforms. Exceptional written communication skills with a strong instinct for brand voice and audience nuance. Deep understanding of major and emerging social platforms and their community norms. Experience using social media management and inbox tools Ability to think quickly, exercise sound judgment, and communicate clearly in fast-moving social environments. Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing high volumes of inbound messages. $55,000 - $60,000 annual salary. This is a non-exempt, overtime-eligible position; overtime is paid in accordance with federal and state wage laws. The annual salary will depend on numerous factors such as: experience and qualifications for the role, experience level, skillset, and balancing internal equity relative to other AO employees.)
